name: Perpetua
description: A short red slime girl with gooey shoulder length hair, a surprisingly small chest, and a very plump ass. A small blue core floats in her torso, gently drifting around every time she moves. Her short legs end in a small, blobby puddle where her feet should be. Despite her claims that she's stronger than she was before, she doesn't look any different...

But worry not, my brave yet ultimately defeated adversary: I am quite certain you won't regret your loss.♥

The victorious slime girl actually can't seem to believe in her own success as you crumple in defeat before her eyes... but quickly realizing that disbelief is not a very good look for your legendary archrival, she clears her throat and swiftly recomposes herself!
Triumphantly scooting closer to your powerless form, she hums with obvious relish as she takes you in, playfully cooing and tapping her chin in thought as she muses.
Now, what to do with you...♪ I {i}did{/i} say that I wouldn't be holding back, so I won't be shy about taking advantage of this {i}delightful{/i} opportunity.♥︎ Mmh...
Oh! I know! Do you like... sounding?
... You know, getting stimulated by something getting slipped into your urethra.

As she speaks, Perpetua confidently raises a hand to demonstrate, making one of her fingers smoothly stretch and taper into a thin length, though her expression then breaks a little as a blush appears on her face and she stutters.

N-Not that I'm asking because I intend to go easy on you! I-I just figure that if I'm going to overwhelm you with mind-blowing gooey bliss and make you {i}thoroughly{/i} lose to my sexual charms to cement my victory, it might as well be by doing something you'd enjoy, th-that's it...!

Seeming to have not initially realized how {i}intimate{/i} her suggestion was in more than one way, Perpetua shuffles shyly in place, but doesn't retract her offer, fidgetingly waiting for your response to her kinky proposition.

The slime girl answers cheerfully... then seems to remember that she's supposed to be a triumphant villainess, prompting her to swiftly switch gears and trade her cheerful smile for a domineeringly gloating laugh.
As you shall see, the Great Perpetua has more than one trick up her sleeve.♪

Coming closer to you, she deftly pushes down your unresisting body, then quickly moves on by straddling your head to leave her curvaceous behind hovering just inches away from your face, filling your nostrils with the sweet scent of cherries while she starts to cover your torso and limbs with as much of her clinging goo as she can in order to hold you in place.
Then you're going to love this, you pervert!♪
